key_threats: 8 wins from 9 — one of the most consistent sides in the league
NRR +3.09 indicates massive run margins in wins — powerful batting lineup
Their single loss could reveal a vulnerability, but they bounced back strongly
key_weaknesses: They have lost once — there is a blueprint for beating them
High NRR games might mean they play loose early expecting easy wins
Away fixture for them — WW playing at home or neutral ground is an advantage

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: Get their top-order out cheaply — Giant Slayers' NRR relies on big batting innings. Restrict them to 80 or less and WW can chase. Bowl Pradhan and Rajpurohit aggressively from over 1.
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: If you restrict them to a chaseable total (under 95), WW have the batting firepower (Keni, Singh, Shah) to win. This is a high-stakes upset opportunity.
